business_description.nature_of_business: Freight and warehousing operations with warehouse, service/repair, and office occupancies.

coverages_discussed.notes: 2024 prior insurance history shows policy numbers BWC-7853-4607, GL-0007119, CA-4481-4597, CP-9793-9090, CU00005026, and MT-0006135. Prior carriers listed for 2020-2023 were CNA Financial, Markel Corporation, Auto-Owners Insurance, and Hartford Financial Services.

positives: No cancellations were indicated in prior insurance history from 2020 through 2024.
Five years of continuous prior insurance history were provided.
Operations are scheduled across two states with identified occupancies and addresses.
concerns: Claim counts were 10 in 2024, 13 in 2023, 12 in 2022, 7 in 2021, and 4 in 2020.
Loss ratios were not provided in the insurance history.
Nine locations include multiple large warehouse occupancies and one service/repair location.
risk_highlights.loss_history_summary: Prior insurance history reflects 4 claims in 2020, 7 in 2021, 12 in 2022, 13 in 2023, and 10 in 2024. No loss ratios were provided, and no cancellations were indicated.
